333,0.032554958,0.14886308,0.76931524,1.3597003,0.81535214,0.22005142,0.85565394,0.08919119,0.34654436,0.009923995,1.0683906,0.09877027,0.17624652,0.31811026,0.94575137,0.0,0.6380575,0.47976884,0.064262725,0.5273481,0.004746761,0.0,0.6861573,0.43393502,0.10986703,0.13127212,0.31980738,0.07375501,0.028682841,0.15259613,0.20587826,1.0045694,1.0681164,0.0,0.055263836,0.1028287,0.014345967,0.2744091,1.2813582,0.0,0.14699145,0.048558027,0.0,0.26196465,0.31444314,0.15119444,0.14467369,0.049768485,0.4463361,1.8151468,0.3168849,0.25938636,0.0,0.0,0.01860531,0.024748728,0.16421586,0.024372622,0.12136529,0.22832875,0.15479577,0.034159005,0.27510464,0.42517623,0.75515175,0.0,0.6398475,0.33661467,0.26735193,0.08056829,0.42000207,0.1364606,0.09687161,0.2916294,0.034619626,0.46265474,0.025880804,0.20542222,0.09683472,0.03791236,0.062112037,0.0695126,0.20886733,0.38264665,0.07910411,0.21601056,0.03639002,0.18709898,0.9203717,0.3496235,0.29003233,2.0281677,0.0049077254,0.014892104,0.5175662,0.008753906,0.10982885,0.140906,0.03629788,0.00057502533,0.8494502,0.46985254,0.5326589,0.40615326,0.036692716,0.25408962,0.2950216,0.12649177,0.18899415,0.093985505,0.07505835,4.275795e-05,0.40165427,0.09161522,0.053666405,0.35461134,0.31543246,0.0,0.6412447,0.0,0.33153138,0.065436035,0.50811833,0.43251228,0.7096882,0.040152162,0.59163225,0.0003579948,0.10355595,0.03996567,0.022441752,0.013581032,0.005173607,0.46732292,0.10082318,0.036851007,0.08568329,0.90006924,0.14694825,0.0014946675,0.041785274,0.27555194,1.2926246,0.41216755,0.7577384,0.27695817,0.06895798,0.23792662,0.069173396,1.1853577,0.27632466,0.00024061045,0.03224257,0.03698654,0.28921345,1.021679,0.055318914,0.1520533,0.0006615012,0.42552528,0.14762874,0.17023693,0.26063594,0.042052943,0.0680012,0.01956962,0.1627938,0.13526031,0.035737343,0.15488033,0.5181715,0.0,0.04694452,0.0678716,0.21425438,0.35722232,0.0,0.05276708,0.3421595,0.376322,0.30991167,0.65994525,0.0111031765,0.4701472,0.80002564,0.07708562,0.20074962,0.11367055,0.096
